creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
Hi!

Please note that PR ports/130442 has been submitted.

It contain changes to net/libexosip2 which you maintain, please
approve them.

----- Forwarded message from amdmi3@FreeBSD.org -----

Date: Mon, 12 Jan 2009 22:33:44 GMT
To: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org, freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org, amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
From: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: ports/130442: Update port: net/linphone to 3.0.0

Synopsis: Update port: net/linphone to 3.0.0

Responsible-Changed-From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->amdmi3
Responsible-Changed-By: amdmi3
Responsible-Changed-When: Mon Jan 12 22:33:43 UTC 2009
Responsible-Changed-Why: 
I'll take it.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=130442

----- End forwarded message -----
